name: part_000
file: tmp_【チラ見せ】hololive 3rd Generation Live#きゅるるん大作戦〜最強アイドル、推すしかないでしょ〜【DAY2】 [XJJXk28ivwY]_gemini-3-flash-preview/part_000.webm

scenes.description: Intro loop for the 'hololive 3rd Generation Live: Kyururun Great Operation' concert, indicating the show will start soon.
Attention slide with guidelines for the audience regarding lighting and cheering.
Promotion of secondary sale merchandise, including penlights, T-shirts, and towels.
A scrolling showcase of various fan messages, comments, and illustrations dedicated to the hololive 3rd Generation members.
Outro animation featuring the live event's logo.
